steps.title: Use the parallel lines property
steps.content: Parallel lines have the same slope. Since line $t$ is parallel to line $s$, we need to find the slope of line $s$.

steps.title: Extract the slope from line s
steps.content:
Rewrite $y + 16 = 7x$ in slope-intercept form:
$$y = 7x - 16$$
The slope is the coefficient of $x$, which is $7$. Since line $t$ is parallel to line $s$, the slope of line $t$ is also $7$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
